Name: FMaterialTextureInfo
Description: This struct holds data about how a texture is sampled within a material.

Variables.Name: SamplingScale
Variables.Description: The scale used when sampling the texture

Variables.Name: UVChannelIndex
Variables.Description: The coordinate index used when sampling the texture

Variables.Name: TextureName
Variables.Description: The texture name. Used for debugging and also to for quick matching of the entries.
